Document:
# OE14CharacterStats System Reference
Quick reference for the OE14CharacterStats system.
## Components
[bold]OE14CharacterStatsComponent[/bold] — stores base stats, modifiers, effective stats, and available points.
[bold]Fields:[/bold] - [mono]BaseStrength / BaseVitality / BaseDexterity / BaseIntelligence[/mono] — immutable base values - [mono]EffectiveStrength / EffectiveVitality / ...[/mono] — calculated (base + modifiers), networked - [mono]StrengthModifiers / ...[/mono] — dictionary of source -> bonus, networked - [mono]AvailablePoints[/mono] — points left to spend
## Key Methods
[bold]OE14CharacterStatsSystem:[/bold] - [mono]RecalculateStats(uid, component)[/mono] — recalculates effective stats and handles overflow - [mono]AddModifier(uid, stat, source, value)[/mono] — adds a modifier from a source - [mono]RemoveModifier(uid, stat, source)[/mono] — removes a modifier
## Network Events
[bold]OE14SpendStatPointEvent[/bold] — raised by client when player spends a point on a stat
## File Locations
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/CharacterStats/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/CharacterStats/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Client/_OE14/CharacterStats/[/mono]
For full details, see [textlink="Character Stats System" link="OE14_DEV_CharacterStats"].
